repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.cloud.aws: IAM least privilege, Lambda concurrency and cold start, ECS Fargate sizing, S3 bucket policy and encryption, CloudWatch alarms, cost guardrails

retrieval_query: aws iam least privilege lambda concurrency cold start ecs fargate s3 bucket policy cloudwatch alarm cost guardrail

validation_smoke.name: platform.cloud.aws L3 validation smoke
signals: iam simulate-principal-policy returns Deny for actions outside the documented task scope
Lambda function reports zero throttles and steady p99 after provisioned concurrency is tuned
s3api get-bucket-policy-status shows IsPublic false and default encryption is enabled
CloudWatch alarm transitions OK->ALARM on an injected fault and back to OK after recovery

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.cloud.aws diagnosis smoke
signals: AccessDenied in CloudTrail traced to a missing condition key or wrong resource ARN rather than a broad grant
Lambda cold-start latency correlates with VPC ENI attach time or large deployment package
ECS task stuck in PENDING due to insufficient Fargate capacity, subnet IP exhaustion, or failed image pull
CloudWatch alarm in INSUFFICIENT_DATA from a renamed metric dimension or missing namespace
Unexpected bill spike isolated to NAT Gateway data processing or cross-AZ transfer in Cost Explorer
